Services added to the contract.

TimeEntry.Title: Backup location [\\10.1.7.11\bkp_BWH] is getting low on free disk space (1.7 TB free of 17.8 TB).
TimeEntry.Notes: Monitor the Veeam backups for the BWH Client. it was due to the low size of the disk of 1.7 TB is free of 17.8 TB. So connected to the server, access the backup repository path. Cleared the backups fr
